research.title: The Uncomfortable Truths About AI Coding Agents Nobody Puts in the Demo
research.whyTrending: HN threads 'Some uncomfortable truths about AI coding agents' and 'AI coding assistants are getting worse?' are driving a real backlash conversation in mid-2026: stuck loops burning 30k-75k tokens on unsolvable problems, maintenance-cost blowup, the job getting less fun. Opinionated counter-narrative against the hype — high engagement, shareable, differentiates from vendor-friendly content.
